name: Everyday Rewards
one_liner: Woolworths' loyalty program — earn points on groceries and redeem for shopping discounts.
benefit: Earn 1 point per $1 at Woolworths, BWS, and EG Fuel; redeem 2,000 points for $10 off a Woolworths shop; weekly personalised bonus offers and the option to convert points to Qantas Frequent Flyer points.

how_to_join.action: Sign up for free at everydayrewards.com.au or in-store at Woolworths
Download the Everyday Rewards app to view personalised offers and scan in-store
how_to_join.detail: Activate the bonus offers each week before shopping.

how_to_join.action: Optionally link to a Qantas Frequent Flyer account to convert points to Qantas points

risks: Points expire after 12 months of inactivity
Bonus offers are personalised — you may not receive the same promotions as other members
est_value: ~$20–60/year in grocery discounts for typical household spend
